{{Quote|Callandri is capable enough to endanger our most capable operatives—that should say it all.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Vanden Willard/Legends|Vanden Willard]]|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Callandri''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] and the leader of the [[Granse Confederacy]].

==Biography==
Born in [[Tilam City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Pendal]], Callandri had led a life of crime since she was a little [[Gender/Legends|girl]]. She worked for different criminal groups on Pendal and eventually left her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] to roam the [[Star/Legends|stars]]. Even then, she chose to use the simple technology of her native world, particularly the [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrower]] [[machine gun]].<ref name="AIR" />

She found work as an "[[Advisor/Legends|advisor]]" to a high executive of [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. Her exact work included [[Assassin/Legends|assassinating]] her employer's enemies, including people inside and outside the corporation. However, she chose to end her relation with Kuat Drive Yards; rumor stated that she resigned during a "hunt," in order to become a freelance [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] with her older cousin, [[Zayl Braith]]. In the wake of her resignation, the high executive sent five renowned bounty hunters to bring her back. Callandri defeated the hunters and sent them back to him, albeit in pieces.<ref name="AIR" />

She then performed her first attempt on the life of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] [[Alton Lochner]]. She found him on the [[Brawl and Grill]] establishment, in [[Trader's Quarter]], [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], and entered the bar shooting. Although Lochner's life was saved by his friends, including the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Tirranna]] and [[Adazian Liebke]], he spent weeks in the infirmary. Tirranna respected Callandri's skills, but also intensely hated her.<ref name="AIR" />

Wanting to get even on Lochner and Tirranna, Callandri and Brayth attacked them again on [[Triewahl Docking Station]], but they were again saved by their partners.<ref name="AIR" />

She then recruited six alien bounty hunters to form the [[Granse Confederacy]] under her command. She met [[Arcuse]], who had formed a partnership with [[Kiran Tatch]] and traveled by [[Rodick Tag]]; Arcuse decided that it would be a good team to join and the others followed him. She also met [[Milacass]], [[Vadon Lenitor]], and [[Lu'daal-ud]], who joined the Confederacy forfeiting their respective pasts. Soon, Callandri was good friends with Lenitor.<ref name="AIR" />

Callandri managed to acquire a [[Q-6100|Jadai Q-6100]] land vehicle. She also killed [[Karu Nelbin]] and stole Nelbin's [[Starship/Legends|ship]], the ''[[Nightcast]]''. She heavily modified the ship to adjust it to the Confederacy's needs.<ref name="AIR" />

In only months, Callandri made the Granse Confederacy a renowned force, and the Rebel Alliance became afraid of it. [[Vanden Willard/Legends|Vanden Willard]] wrote an extensive report on Callandri's activities, consulting Lochner and other survivors of her attacks.<ref name="AIR" />

==Personality and traits==
At this point of her life, Callandri was a muscled young woman with dark long [[Hair/Legends|hair]] braided into aconlins—a common hairstyle in Tilam City. She usually dressed in gray or black, using her clothes to hide weapons.<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
